ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Algorithm used in the model */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the model */,
  "deployment_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was deployed */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model's purpose and functionality */,
  "model_status" TEXT /* Current status of the model (e.g., active, inactive, under review) */,
  "model_owner" TEXT /* Primary owner or team responsible for the model */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the model was updated */,
  "training_data_source" TEXT /* Source of the training data used for the model */,
  "model_complexity" TEXT /* Measure of the model's complexity (e.g., simple, moderate, complex) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the metrics are for */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Overall accuracy of the model */,
  "f1_score" REAL /* F1 score of the model */,
  "precision" REAL /* Precision of the model */,
  "recall" REAL /* Recall of the model */,
  "auc_roc" REAL /* Area Under the Receiver Operating Characteristic Curve */,
  "log_loss" REAL /* Logarithmic loss, a measure of performance for classification models */,
  "confusion_matrix" TEXT /* Confusion matrix for the model */,
  "cross_validation_score" REAL /* Average cross-validation score to assess model stability */,
  "model_version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model version the metrics are for */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fairness_metrics" (
  "fairness_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fairness metric entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the fairness metrics are for */,
  "avg_abs_odds_diff_gender" REAL /* Average absolute odds difference for gender */,
  "avg_abs_odds_diff_race" REAL /* Average absolute odds difference for race */,
  "balanced_accuracy" REAL /* Balanced accuracy of the model */,
  "theil_index_gender" REAL /* Theil index for gender */,
  "theil_index_race" REAL /* Theil index for race */,
  "coefficient_of_variation_gender" REAL /* Coefficient of variation for gender */,
  "coefficient_of_variation_race" REAL /* Coefficient of variation for race */,
  "gen_entropy_index_gender" REAL /* Generalized entropy index for gender */,
  "gen_entropy_index_race" REAL /* Generalized entropy index for race */,
  "equal_opportunity_diff_gender" REAL /* Equal opportunity difference for gender */,
  "equal_opportunity_diff_race" REAL /* Equal opportunity difference for race */,
  "disparate_impact_gender" REAL /* Disparate impact ratio for gender */,
  "disparate_impact_race" REAL /* Disparate impact ratio for race */,
  "statistical_parity_difference_gender" REAL /* Statistical parity difference for gender */,
  "statistical_parity_difference_race" REAL /* Statistical parity difference for race */,
  "model_version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model version the metrics are for */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fairness_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fairness_metrics_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "disparity_indices" (
  "disparity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each disparity index entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the disparity indices are for */,
  "tpr_diff_gender" REAL /* True positive rate difference for gender */,
  "tpr_diff_race" REAL /* True positive rate difference for race */,
  "fpr_diff_gender" REAL /* False positive rate difference for gender */,
  "fpr_diff_race" REAL /* False positive rate difference for race */,
  "model_version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model version the indices are for */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("disparity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_disparity_indices_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data scientist, compliance officer) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the organization */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the user account is active */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* User permissions and access levels */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the model */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the access session */,
  "access_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_access_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the report is for */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., performance, fairness) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report document */,
  "report_summary" TEXT /* Brief summary of the report's findings */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., pending, completed, reviewed) */,
  "reviewed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who reviewed the report */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was reviewed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_reviewed_by FOREIGN KEY ("reviewed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the change is for */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., model update, metric update) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  "audit_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the audit log entry */,
  "change_impact" TEXT /* A brief description of the impact of the change */,
  "reviewed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who reviewed the change */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was reviewed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_reviewed_by FOREIGN KEY ("reviewed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the version is for */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the model */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was released */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in the version */,
  "model_performance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance metrics for the model version */,
  "model_fairness_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fairness metrics for the model version */,
  "model_disparity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the disparity indices for the model version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_fairness_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_fairness_id") REFERENCES fairness_metrics ("fairness_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_disparity_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_disparity_id") REFERENCES disparity_indices ("disparity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_performance_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_performance_id") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_inputs" (
  "input_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model input */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the input is for */,
  "input_name" TEXT /* Name of the input */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the input */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the input */,
  "input_source" TEXT /* Source of the input data (e.g., internal, external) */,
  "input_required" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the input is required for the model */,
  "input_default_value" TEXT /* Default value for the input if not provided */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("input_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_inputs_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_outputs" (
  "output_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model output */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the output is for */,
  "output_name" TEXT /* Name of the output */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the output */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the output */,
  "output_source" TEXT /* Source of the output data (e.g., model prediction, external data) */,
  "output_required" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the output is required for the model */,
  "output_default_value" TEXT /* Default value for the output if not provided */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("output_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_outputs_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_deployments" (
  "deployment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model deployment */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model version being deployed */,
  "environment" TEXT /* Environment where the model is deployed (e.g., production, staging) */,
  "deployment_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was deployed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the deployment (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "deployment_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the deployment */,
  "deployed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who deployed the model */,
  "deployment_environment" TEXT /* Detailed environment information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("deployment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_deployments_deployed_by FOREIGN KEY ("deployed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_deployments_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES model_versions ("version_id")
)
